status.description: Overall health: ok when fresh, degraded when indexer is lagging, error when the database is unreachable.

head.description: Latest block number reported by the RPC, or null if the RPC call failed.

chain.description: On-chain state observed by this DAO API.

lastEventTimestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of the most recent indexed event, or null if no events have been recorded.

lagSeconds.description: Seconds between now and lastEventTimestamp, or null if the indexer hasn't produced any events.

fresh.description: True when lagSeconds is within the freshness threshold (300s).

indexer.description: Indexer freshness signals derived from app tables.

DelegationItem.description: Single delegation transfer event in the historical delegation feed.

OrderDirection.description: Sort direction for ordered query results.

DelegatorsResponse.description: Paginated delegators for a delegate address.

DelegatorItem.description: Aggregated delegation amount and latest timestamp for one delegator.

TokenHistoricalPriceResponse.description: Historical token price points ordered by timestamp.

price.description: Historical price value as a decimal string.

TokenPropertiesResponse.description: Token properties enriched with the current token price.

TokenProperties.description: Core token supply and treasury attributes for the active DAO token.

message.description: Optional implementation detail or validation context for the error.
message.example: Validation error: Expected number, received string

ErrorResponse.description: Generic error payload returned by the API.

totalCount.description: Total number of matching feed events.

logIndex.description: Log index within the transaction receipt.

value.description: Optional event value encoded as a decimal string when applicable.

FeedItem.description: Single event in the governance activity feed.

FeedEventType.description: Filter events by governance activity type.

FeedMetadata.description: Type-specific metadata for the feed event. Narrow by the `kind` discriminator.

votingPower.description: Voter voting power, as a decimal string.

FeedVoteMetadata.description: Metadata payload for a VOTE feed event.

votingPower.description: Proposer voting power at proposal creation, as a decimal string.

FeedProposalMetadata.description: Metadata payload for a PROPOSAL feed event.

endBlock.description: New end block after the extension.

endTimestamp.description: New proposal end timestamp in Unix seconds, as a decimal string.

FeedProposalExtendedMetadata.description: Metadata payload for a PROPOSAL_EXTENDED feed event.

amount.description: Transferred amount, as a decimal string.

FeedTransferMetadata.description: Metadata payload for a TRANSFER feed event.

amount.description: Delegated voting power, as a decimal string.

FeedDelegationMetadata.description: Metadata payload for a DELEGATION feed event.

FeedEventTypeList.description: Filter events by governance activity type. Pass repeated query params or a comma-delimited list.

threshold.description: Threshold value encoded as a decimal string.

EventRelevanceThresholdResponse.description: Resolved threshold for a feed event type and relevance level.

previousValue.description: Supply value at the start of the comparison window, encoded as a decimal string (raw token base units).

currentValue.description: Supply value at the end of the comparison window, encoded as a decimal string (raw token base units).

changeRate.description: Fractional ratio between current and previous values (0.0523 = +5.23%, -0.10 = -10%). Reported with 6 decimals; 0 when previousValue is 0.

rawDelta.description: Signed bigint delta as a decimal string: currentValue - previousValue.

SupplyComparisonResponse.description: Supply metric comparison between current and previous periods.

activeSupply.description: Active token supply encoded as a decimal string.

ActiveSupplyResponse.description: Active token supply for the selected comparison window.

currentProposalsLaunched.description: Number of proposals launched in the current period.

oldProposalsLaunched.description: Number of proposals launched in the comparison period.

changeRate.description: Fractional ratio between current and previous periods (0.0523 = +5.23%, -0.10 = -10%). Reported with 6 decimals; 0 when the previous period is empty.

ProposalsComparisonResponse.description: Proposal launch comparison between two adjacent time windows.

currentVotes.description: Number of votes cast in the current period.

oldVotes.description: Number of votes cast in the comparison period.

changeRate.description: Fractional ratio between current and previous periods (0.0523 = +5.23%, -0.10 = -10%). Reported with 6 decimals; 0 when the previous period is empty.

VotesComparisonResponse.description: Vote-count comparison between two adjacent time windows.

currentAverageTurnout.description: Average turnout for the current period encoded as a string.

oldAverageTurnout.description: Average turnout for the previous period encoded as a string.

changeRate.description: Fractional ratio between current and previous periods (0.0523 = +5.23%, -0.10 = -10%). Reported with 6 decimals; 0 when the previous period is empty.

rawDelta.description: Signed bigint delta as a decimal string: currentAverageTurnout - oldAverageTurnout.

AverageTurnoutComparisonResponse.description: Average turnout comparison between two adjacent time windows.

totalProposals.description: Total proposals reviewed in the dataset.

votedProposals.description: Number of proposals the delegate voted on.

neverVoted.description: Whether the delegate never cast a vote.

winRate.description: Share of proposals where the delegate sided with outcome.

yesRate.description: Share of delegate votes cast in support.

avgTimeBeforeEnd.description: Average seconds between the delegate vote and proposal end time.

ProposalActivityResponse.description: Delegate proposal activity metrics and proposal-by-proposal history.

ProposalActivityItem.description: Combined proposal and delegate vote context for one activity row.

timestamp.description: Proposal creation timestamp in Unix seconds as a string.

forVotes.description: Votes cast in favor, encoded as a decimal string.

againstVotes.description: Votes cast against, encoded as a decimal string.

abstainVotes.description: Abstain votes, encoded as a decimal string.

ProposalActivityProposal.description: Proposal snapshot included in the delegate activity response.

votingPower.description: Voting power used by the delegate, encoded as a string.

timestamp.description: Vote timestamp in Unix seconds as a string.

ProposalActivityUserVote.description: Vote cast by the requested delegate for a given proposal.

timestamp.description: Proposal creation timestamp in Unix seconds.

forVotes.description: Votes cast in favor, encoded as a decimal string.

againstVotes.description: Votes cast against, encoded as a decimal string.

abstainVotes.description: Abstain votes, encoded as a decimal string.

startTimestamp.description: Proposal start timestamp in Unix seconds.

endTimestamp.description: Proposal end timestamp in Unix seconds.

queuedTimestamp.description: Timestamp (Unix seconds) when the proposal was queued, or null if it never was.

executedTimestamp.description: Timestamp (Unix seconds) when the proposal was executed, or null if it never was.

queuedTxHash.description: Transaction hash of the queue event, or null if the proposal was never queued.

executedTxHash.description: Transaction hash of the execute event, or null if the proposal was never executed.

quorum.description: Required quorum encoded as a decimal string.

calldatas.description: Encoded calldata payloads executed by the proposal. Omitted when the request sets `lean=true`.

values.description: ETH values attached to each call, encoded as strings. Omitted when the request sets `lean=true`.

targets.description: Contract targets invoked by the proposal. Omitted when the request sets `lean=true`.

OnchainProposalStatusList.description: Proposal status filter. Pass repeated query params or a comma-delimited list.

totalCount.description: Total number of matching historical balance rows.

HistoricalBalancesResponse.description: Paginated historical balance records for one account.

balance.description: Account balance after the historical event.

delta.description: Balance change introduced by the historical event.

timestamp.description: Event timestamp in Unix seconds as a string.

logIndex.description: Log index within the transaction receipt.

HistoricalBalance.description: Single historical balance record enriched with transfer context.

value.description: Transferred amount encoded as a decimal string.

HistoricalBalanceTransfer.description: Transfer event associated with a historical balance row.

lastUpdate.description: Latest refresh time in ISO-8601 format.

LastUpdateResponse.description: Response payload describing the latest update time for a chart.

totalCount.description: Total number of matching day buckets across the requested window (ignores skip/limit).

date.description: Unix day bucket represented as a timestamp string.

high.description: Delegation percentage value for the day bucket.

totalCount.description: Total number of matching historical voting power rows.

votingPower.description: Voting power after the event, encoded as a decimal string.

delta.description: Voting power change introduced by the event.

timestamp.description: Event timestamp in Unix seconds as a string.

logIndex.description: Log index within the transaction receipt.

HistoricalVotingPower.description: Single historical voting power record enriched with delegation and transfer context.

HistoricalVotingPowerDelegation.description: Delegation event associated with a historical voting power row.

HistoricalVotingPowerTransfer.description: Transfer event associated with a historical voting power row.

VotingPowerVariationsResponse.description: List of voting power variations for multiple accounts in the selected period.

PeriodResponse.description: Inclusive time period represented as ISO-8601 timestamps.

previousVotingPower.description: Voting power at the start of the comparison window.

currentVotingPower.description: Voting power at the end of the comparison window.

absoluteChange.description: Absolute voting power change encoded as a decimal string.

percentageChange.description: Relative voting power change as a decimal string (e.g. "5.23"). Set to the sentinel "NO BASELINE" when the previous voting power is zero.

VotingPowerVariation.description: Voting power delta for a single account across two timestamps.

VotingPowerVariationsByAccountIdResponse.description: Voting power variation response for a single account.

totalCount.description: Total number of matching voting power rows.

votingPower.description: Current voting power encoded as a decimal string.

votesCount.description: Total votes cast by the account.

proposalsCount.description: Total proposals created by the account.

delegationsCount.description: Total delegations associated with the account.

balance.description: Current token balance encoded as a decimal string.

VotingPower.description: Current voting power snapshot for one account.

VotingPowerVariationField.description: Embedded voting power delta metadata for a current voting power row.

AccountBalanceVariationsResponse.description: List of balance variations for multiple accounts in the selected period.

previousBalance.description: Balance at the start of the comparison window.

currentBalance.description: Balance at the end of the comparison window.

absoluteChange.description: Absolute balance change encoded as a decimal string.

percentageChange.description: Relative balance change as a decimal string (e.g. "5.23"). Set to the sentinel "NO BASELINE" when the previous balance is zero.

AccountBalanceVariation.description: Balance delta for a single account across two timestamps.

AccountBalanceVariationsByAccountIdRespo.description: Balance variation response for a single account.

AccountInteractionsResponse.description: Paginated list of account interaction aggregates.

amountTransferred.description: Net amount transferred between the requested account and the counterparty.

totalVolume.description: Gross transfer volume between the requested account and the counterparty.

transferCount.description: Number of transfers observed for the interaction pair.

AccountInteraction.description: Aggregated interaction metrics between the requested account and another account.

amount.description: Transferred amount encoded as a decimal string.

timestamp.description: Transfer timestamp in Unix seconds as a string.

logIndex.description: Log index within the transaction receipt.

isCex.description: Whether the transfer touched a centralized exchange.

isDex.description: Whether the transfer touched a decentralized exchange.

isLending.description: Whether the transfer touched a lending protocol.

isTotal.description: Whether the transfer affects total-supply accounting.

votingPower.description: Voting power encoded as a decimal string.

VotersResponse.description: Paginated voter or non-voter records for a proposal.

Voter.description: Voter or non-voter record associated with a proposal.

DaoResponse.description: Current governance parameters and feature flags for the active DAO.

date.description: Unix day bucket represented as a timestamp string.

high.description: Highest observed value for the period.

volume.description: Total volume observed for the period.

endDate.description: End cursor for the current page.

startDate.description: Start cursor for the current page.

RevenueActionsResponse.description: Monthly action counts by category (Registration, Renewal, Premium).

date.description: Month start (Unix timestamp in seconds, UTC).

actions.description: Number of actions of this category in the given month.

RevenueActiveNamesResponse.description: Monthly net change and cumulative count of active .eth names.

date.description: Month start (Unix timestamp in seconds, UTC).

netChange.description: Net change in active .eth names for the month.

cumulativeActive.description: Cumulative count of active .eth names as of the month.

RevenueNewWalletsResponse.description: Monthly new-wallet counts and the cumulative wallet total for ENS.

date.description: Month start (Unix timestamp in seconds, UTC).

newWallets.description: New wallets that interacted with ENS in the given month.

cumulativeWallets.description: Cumulative count of ENS wallets as of the given month.

RevenueRenewalFunnelResponse.description: Renewal funnel per expiry month: terms expiring, renewed, churned, and renewal rate.

date.description: Expiry month start (Unix timestamp in seconds, UTC).

termsExpiring.description: Total .eth terms expiring in the given month.

renewedCount.description: Number of expiring terms that were renewed.

churnedCount.description: Number of expiring terms that were not renewed.

renewalRatePct.description: Renewal rate for the month, as a percentage (0-100).

RevenueRenewalFunnelItem.description: Single renewal-funnel datapoint keyed by expiry month.

RevenueTotalsResponse.description: Monthly ENS revenue totals split into registration, premium, and renewal, in both USD and ETH.

date.description: Month start (Unix timestamp in seconds, UTC).

registrationUsd.description: USD revenue from new .eth registrations in the month.

premiumUsd.description: USD revenue from temporary premium auctions in the given month.

renewalUsd.description: USD revenue from .eth renewals in the given month.

totalUsd.description: Total USD revenue for the month (upstream sum; not recomputed).

registrationEth.description: ETH revenue from new .eth registrations in the month.

premiumEth.description: ETH revenue from temporary premium auctions in the given month.

renewalEth.description: ETH revenue from .eth renewals in the given month.

RevenueByCategoryResponse.description: Monthly ENS revenue split by category (Registration vs Renewal) in USD and ETH, sourced from the Steakhouse accounting ledger.

date.description: Month start (Unix timestamp in seconds, UTC).

revenueUsd.description: USD revenue for the category in the given month.

revenueEth.description: ETH revenue for the category in the given month.

RevenueByCategoryCategory.description: Revenue category as reported by the Steakhouse accounting ledger.

RevenueRenewalTenureResponse.description: Per expiry month, count of names in each tenure bucket (0/1/2/3+ renewals) and the total renewals in that bucket.

date.description: Expiry month start (Unix timestamp in seconds, UTC).

names.description: Count of names in this tenure bucket for the expiry month.

totalRenewalsInBucket.description: Total renewals contributed by names in this bucket.

RevenueRenewalTenureItem.description: Single renewal-tenure datapoint keyed by expiry month.

RevenueRenewalTenureBucket.description: Tenure bucket label as returned by Dune.

author.description: Address or ENS of the author.

body.description: Proposal body. Omitted when the request sets `lean=true`.

start.description: Voting start timestamp in Unix seconds.

end.description: Voting end timestamp in Unix seconds.

updated.description: Last update timestamp in Unix seconds.

flagged.description: Whether the proposal was flagged by Snapshot.

OffchainProposalStatusList.description: Snapshot proposal state filter. Pass repeated query params or a comma-delimited list.

expiry.description: Signature expiry timestamp as decimal string

minVotingPower.description: Minimum voting power required to relay, as a decimal string (uint256).

maxRelayPerAddressPerDay.description: Maximum number of relays per address per UTC day, per operation.

resetsAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the next UTC-midnight reset.

hasEnoughBalance.description: True when the relayer wallet's native balance is at or above the configured threshold.

balanceWei.description: Current native balance of the relayer wallet, as a decimal string (uint256, in wei).

thresholdWei.description: Minimum native balance the relayer must hold to be considered funded, as a decimal string (uint256, in wei).

createdAt.description: Creation timestamp in Unix milliseconds, as a decimal string.

updatedAt.description: Last-updated timestamp in Unix milliseconds, as a decimal string.

DraftAction.description: A single proposal action encoded as a JSON object.

post.description: Submit an EIP-712 signed delegation on behalf of a user. The relayer pays gas.

parameters.description: DAO identifier (case-insensitive at runtime; the typed contract is lowercase, e.g. "ens").

get.description: Returns the static configuration values the dashboard needs to render eligibility hints.

parameters.name: dao

get.summary: Per-address relay usage for the current UTC day
get.description: Returns the number of relay calls already used and remaining for the given address, split by operation. Reads do not consume the rate limit.

parameters.name: dao
parameters.description: DAO identifier (case-insensitive at runtime; the typed contract is lowercase, e.g. "ens").

get.description: Returns the relayer wallet's current native balance and whether it meets the configured threshold. Lets the dashboard hide or warn about gasless actions before users sign a request.

parameters.name: dao
parameters.description: DAO identifier (case-insensitive at runtime; the typed contract is lowercase, e.g. "ens").

get.summary: Get enriched data for an address
get.description: Returns label information from Arkham, ENS data, and whether the address is an EOA or contract. Arkham data is stored permanently. ENS data is cached with a configurable TTL.

schema.description: Ethereum address (checksummed or lowercase)

isContract.description: Whether the address is a smart contract (true) or an externally-owned account (false)

entity.description: Human-readable name of the entity that owns the address according to Arkham Intelligence

label.description: Fine-grained label for the specific address within the entity

twitter.description: Twitter/X handle associated with the entity, without '@'

arkham.description: Arkham Intelligence label data. null when no data is available for the address.

name.description: Primary ENS name reverse-resolved for this address

avatar.description: URL of the ENS avatar image

banner.description: URL of the ENS profile banner image

ens.description: ENS (Ethereum Name Service) data. null when no ENS name is registered for the address. Cached with a configurable TTL.

get.summary: Get enriched data for multiple addresses
get.description: Returns label information from Arkham, ENS data, and address type for multiple addresses. Maximum 100 addresses per request. Arkham data is stored permanently. ENS data is cached with a configurable TTL.

schema.description: One or more Ethereum addresses to enrich. Can be passed as a repeated query parameter or a single value. Maximum 100 addresses per request.

isContract.description: Whether the address is a smart contract (true) or an externally-owned account (false)

entity.description: Human-readable name of the entity that owns the address according to Arkham Intelligence

label.description: Fine-grained label for the specific address within the entity

twitter.description: Twitter/X handle associated with the entity, without '@'

arkham.description: Arkham Intelligence label data. null when no data is available for the address.

name.description: Primary ENS name reverse-resolved for this address

avatar.description: URL of the ENS avatar image

banner.description: URL of the ENS profile banner image

ens.description: ENS (Ethereum Name Service) data. null when no ENS name is registered for the address. Cached with a configurable TTL.

results.description: Enrichment results for each successfully resolved address. Addresses that failed to resolve are omitted.
